_doc: Network connection profiles for ResilientSession. Auto-loaded on init.
_priority: Profiles are matched top-to-bottom by domain pattern. First match wins.

wsl.description: Windows Subsystem for Linux — virtualized network stack, DNS issues common

profiles.description: Paperclip platform on local lab network (self-signed ingress cert)
profiles.notes: Ingress uses self-signed cert for ingress.local. Always skip TLS verification.

profiles.description: Grafana monitoring on local lab network
profiles.auth_hint: Use GRAFANA_TOKEN env var or admin:admin default

profiles.description: Local development services (MCP servers, dev servers)
profiles.notes: Direct connection always works for localhost from within WSL.

profiles.description: Any public HTTPS endpoint (GitHub, npm, etc.)
profiles.notes: Standard TLS verification. No special handling needed.
